abilities.name: Strength
abilities.description: Raw physical power. Modifies melee attack and damage rolls.

abilities.name: Agility
abilities.description: Speed and coordination. Modifies ranged attacks, AC, and initiative.

abilities.name: Stamina
abilities.description: Endurance and constitution. Modifies hit points.

abilities.name: Personality
abilities.description: Charisma and force of will. Modifies reactions.

abilities.name: Intelligence
abilities.description: Reasoning and learning. Modifies wizard spells known and maximum spell level.

abilities.name: Luck
abilities.description: Fortune and fate. Modifies a variety of rolls based on the character's birth augur.
